# message: testdata.Person

# ── Projection: flat fields ──

{ name, age }
{"name": "Alice", "age": 30, "status": "ACTIVE", "tags": ["admin", "staff"]}
{"name": "Bob", "age": 17, "status": "INACTIVE"}
----
{"name": "Alice", "age": 30}
{"name": "Bob", "age": 17}

{ name }
{"name": "Alice", "age": 30}
{"name": "Bob"}
{}
----
{"name": "Alice"}
{"name": "Bob"}
{}

{ }
{"name": "Alice", "age": 30}
----
{}

{ .. }
{"name": "Alice", "age": 30, "status": "ACTIVE"}
----
{"name": "Alice", "age": 30, "status": "ACTIVE"}

{ name, .. }
{"name": "Alice", "age": 30, "status": "ACTIVE"}
----
{"name": "Alice", "age": 30, "status": "ACTIVE"}

{ #1, #2 }
{"name": "Alice", "age": 30, "status": "ACTIVE"}
----
{"name": "Alice", "age": 30}

{ name, #2 }
{"name": "Alice", "age": 30}
----
{"name": "Alice", "age": 30}

# ── Projection: nested messages ──

{ name, address { city } }
{"name": "Alice", "address": {"city": "New York", "country": "US", "zip": 10001}}
{"name": "Bob", "address": {"city": "London", "country": "UK"}}
----
{"name": "Alice", "address": {"city": "New York"}}
{"name": "Bob", "address": {"city": "London"}}

{ address { city, country } }
{"name": "Alice", "address": {"city": "NYC", "country": "US", "zip": 10001}}
----
{"address": {"city": "NYC", "country": "US"}}

{ name, address { city, location { lat } } }
{"name": "Alice", "address": {"city": "NYC", "location": {"lat": 40712776, "lon": -74005974}}}
----
{"name": "Alice", "address": {"city": "NYC", "location": {"lat": 40712776}}}

{ name, address { city, .. }, .. }
{"name": "Alice", "address": {"city": "NYC", "country": "US", "zip": 10001}}
----
{"name": "Alice", "address": {"city": "NYC", "country": "US", "zip": 10001}}

# ── Projection: absent fields ──

{ name }
{}
{"age": 30}
----
{}
{}

{ address { city } }
{"name": "Alice"}
----
{}

# message: testdata.Order

# ── Projection: repeated fields ──

{ id, customer }
{"id": 42, "customer": "Alice", "items": [{"sku": "W-1", "quantity": 2}, {"sku": "G-2"}], "totalCents": 8997, "shipped": true}
----
{"id": 42, "customer": "Alice"}

{ customer, items { sku } }
{"customer": "Alice", "items": [{"sku": "W-1", "quantity": 2, "price": 1999}, {"sku": "G-2", "quantity": 1, "price": 4999}]}
----
{"customer": "Alice", "items": [{"sku": "W-1"}, {"sku": "G-2"}]}

# message: testdata.Person

# ── Filter: integer comparisons ──

age > 18
{"name": "Alice", "age": 30}
{"name": "Bob", "age": 17}
{"name": "Charlie", "age": 18}
----
true
false
false

age >= 18
{"age": 18}
{"age": 17}
----
true
false

age < 18
{"age": 17}
{"age": 18}
{"age": 30}
----
true
false
false

age <= 18
{"age": 18}
{"age": 19}
----
true
false

age == 30
{"age": 30}
{"age": 17}
----
true
false

age != 30
{"age": 30}
{"age": 17}
----
false
true

# ── Filter: string comparisons ──

name == "Alice"
{"name": "Alice"}
{"name": "Bob"}
{}
----
true
false
false

name != "Alice"
{"name": "Bob"}
{"name": "Alice"}
----
true
false

name starts_with "Ali"
{"name": "Alice"}
{"name": "Bob"}
----
true
false

name ends_with "ice"
{"name": "Alice"}
{"name": "Bob"}
----
true
false

name contains "lic"
{"name": "Alice"}
{"name": "Bob"}
----
true
false

# ── Filter: bool, enum, set, exists ──

# message: testdata.Order

shipped == true
{"shipped": true}
{"shipped": false}
----
true
false

# message: testdata.Person

status == 1
{"status": "ACTIVE"}
{"status": "INACTIVE"}
{"status": "UNKNOWN"}
----
true
false
false

status in [1, 2]
{"status": "ACTIVE"}
{"status": "INACTIVE"}
{"status": "UNKNOWN"}
----
true
true
false

exists(address)
{"name": "Alice", "address": {"city": "NYC"}}
{"name": "Bob"}
----
true
false

# ── Filter: nested fields ──

address.city == "New York"
{"address": {"city": "New York"}}
{"address": {"city": "London"}}
----
true
false

address.zip > 10000
{"address": {"zip": 10001}}
{"address": {"zip": 5000}}
----
true
false

# ── Filter: logical operators ──

age > 18 && status == 1
{"age": 30, "status": "ACTIVE"}
{"age": 17, "status": "ACTIVE"}
{"age": 30, "status": "INACTIVE"}
----
true
false
false

age > 18 || status == 2
{"age": 30, "status": "ACTIVE"}
{"age": 17, "status": "INACTIVE"}
{"age": 17, "status": "ACTIVE"}
----
true
true
false

!age > 50
{"age": 30}
{"age": 60}
----
true
false

(age > 18 || status == 2) && age < 50
{"age": 10, "status": "INACTIVE"}
{"age": 60, "status": "ACTIVE"}
{"age": 10, "status": "ACTIVE"}
----
true
false
false

# ── Combined: WHERE ... SELECT ──

WHERE age > 18 SELECT { name }
{"name": "Alice", "age": 30, "status": "ACTIVE"}
{"name": "Bob", "age": 17}
{"name": "Charlie", "age": 25}
----
{"name": "Alice"}
<none>
{"name": "Charlie"}

WHERE status == 1 SELECT { name, address { city, country } }
{"name": "Alice", "age": 30, "address": {"city": "NYC", "country": "US", "zip": 10001}, "status": "ACTIVE"}
{"name": "Bob", "status": "INACTIVE"}
----
{"name": "Alice", "address": {"city": "NYC", "country": "US"}}
<none>

WHERE age > 18 SELECT { name, .. }
{"name": "Alice", "age": 30, "status": "ACTIVE"}
{"name": "Bob", "age": 17}
----
{"name": "Alice", "age": 30, "status": "ACTIVE"}
<none>

WHERE address.city == "NYC" SELECT { name, .. }
{"name": "Alice", "age": 30, "address": {"city": "NYC", "country": "US"}, "status": "ACTIVE"}
{"name": "Bob", "age": 17, "address": {"city": "London"}}
----
{"name": "Alice", "age": 30, "address": {"city": "NYC", "country": "US"}, "status": "ACTIVE"}
<none>

WHERE age > 18 SELECT { age }
{"name": "Alice", "age": 30}
{"name": "Bob", "age": 17}
----
{"age": 30}
<none>

# message: testdata.Order

WHERE total_cents > 5000 SELECT { id, customer }
{"id": 42, "customer": "Alice", "totalCents": 8997, "shipped": true}
{"id": 1, "customer": "Bob", "totalCents": 500}
----
{"id": 42, "customer": "Alice"}
<none>

# ── Edge cases ──

# message: testdata.Person

age > 0
{}
----
false

# ── Deep search ──

# Deep search with schema requires recursive field resolution which is
# not implemented. Tested via schema-free e2e.rs instead.
